'''''Abrogator''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that acted as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the fleet sent to [[Saloch²|Saloch 2]] to quell a group of [[Lortan]]s during the [[Reslian Purge]].

==History==
The [[6/37th|sixth]] squadron of the [[37th Imperial Fighter Wing]] was assigned to the ''Abrogator'', under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Lun Tessra]]. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] was posted to the squadron after graduation from the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], and eventually rose to command the unit.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
